title: AI Agent
description: An AI agent or tool discovered by Wing Security's AI discovery engine.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AI agent.

name.description: The name of the AI agent or tool.

vendor.description: The provider or vendor of the AI agent.

owner.description: The organizational owner or team responsible for this agent.

discoveryMethod.description: How Wing Security discovered this agent (e.g., IdP integration, API monitoring).

permissions.description: Permissions and data access granted to this AI agent.

dataAccess.description: Types of data this agent can access (e.g., Email, Code, Customer Data).

riskScore.description: Risk score based on permissions, behavior, and threat intelligence.

riskLevel.description: Categorical risk assessment for this AI agent.

status.description: Governance status of the AI agent.

threatIndicators.description: Threat indicators detected for this agent mapped to MITRE ATT&CK.

firstSeen.description: Timestamp when this agent was first discovered.

lastSeen.description: Timestamp of most recent observed activity.
